name: CFSC Checks Cashed Broadway
description_short: CFSC Broadway offers 24-hour check cashing, money transfers, bill payments, and prepaid cards without requiring a bank account or credit check.
description_long:
Community Financial Services (CFSC) operates a 24-hour check-cashing location at 785 Broadway in Brooklyn, NY 11206, serving the Williamsburg area and surrounding communities. The location is part of a larger CFSC network with multiple branches across Brooklyn, Queens, and Manhattan, indicating an established presence in the New York metro area. CFSC positions itself as a one-stop financial services provider for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash and financial services without traditional banking infrastructure.

CFSC Broadway provides a comprehensive suite of financial services beyond basic check cashing. Core offerings include check cashing (personal and business checks), money orders, electronic bill pay, domestic and international money transfers, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), ATM access, foreign currency exchange (80+ countries), prepaid cellular services, EZ Pass, Transit/MetroCard purchases, lottery services, coin exchange, and tax refund cashing. The company emphasizes convenience and accessibility, requiring only a photo ID and basic personal information to cash checks—no bank account, no waiting for funds to clear, and no monthly fees.

What distinguishes CFSC Broadway is its 24-hour operation in a dense urban market, compared to most peer locations that operate 7-9 hours daily. The company also offers multilingual services (Se Habla Español) and an unusually broad service menu that consolidates money movement, bill payment, and prepaid financial products into single locations. Their prepaid debit card option requires no credit check, appealing to credit-challenged consumers. The foreign currency exchange service and 80+ country coverage is notably comprehensive for a check-cashing venue.

The honest assessment: CFSC Broadway is a legitimate check-cashing and alternative financial services provider well-suited for consumers without bank accounts or those needing immediate cash access. However, the website provides no fee transparency—charges for check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and other services are not disclosed, which is typical but concerning for cost-conscious consumers. No information is provided about APR, interest rates, or terms for any products. The 24-hour operation and broad service menu are genuine advantages for accessibility, but consumers should verify all fees before using services.
pros: Open 24 hours daily, 7 days a week—unique among peer locations
No bank account required to cash checks; funds available immediately
No credit check for prepaid debit card (Yes! Debit Account)
Multilingual services (Se Habla Español) for Spanish-speaking customers
One-stop service: check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, and prepaid cards in one location
Wide geographic reach with 12+ CFSC locations across Brooklyn, Queens, and Manhattan
Accepts multiple government-issued photo IDs (driver's license, passport, state ID, student ID, work ID)
cons: No fee schedule disclosed on website—customers cannot compare costs before visiting
No information on money transfer rates, margins, or international transfer timelines
Limited details on prepaid card features, limits, or maintenance fees
No online or phone-based services mentioned; all transactions appear to require in-person visits
24-hour operation may indicate a higher-risk urban location; safety/security not addressed
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Night-shift workers and individuals who need financial services outside standard business hours
Immigrants and international workers who need foreign currency exchange and worldwide money transfers
Consumers seeking a prepaid debit card alternative without credit checks or bank account requirements
diagnosis: CFSC Broadway is best for unbanked or underbanked New York residents who need immediate check cashing, bill payments, or money transfers without a traditional bank account or credit check. The primary caveat is that fees are not publicly disclosed on the website, so consumers should call (718) 452-5800 or visit in person to understand the true cost of services before committing.
